description: List in Judaeo-Arabic of at least seven of the "blemishes" (ʿuyūb) a woman can have, such as a bad odor, a propensity to sweat, a coarse voice, and at least two having to do with the breasts. Of documentary interest not least because there are a number of documents in which a man complains about the "blemishes" of his wife (e.g. T-S AS 147.17) or a female slave (e.g. T-S Misc.23.8). On verso is a medical text (literary) in Arabic script, and there are additional jottings in Arabic script filling the margins of each side. ASE.
description_he: רשימה ביהודית-ערבית של לפחות שבעה 'פגמים' (עיוב) שאישה יכולה להיות בעלת, כגון ריח רע, נטייה להזיע, קול גס. בורסו טקסט רפואי (ספרותי) בכתב ערבי, עם רישומים נוספים בשוליים. ASE.
